proposal: The International Bank of Somewhere offers rescue money. The interest rate is expressed as a haiku and a firm handshake.

options.label: Take the money
options.result_text: The Treasury inhales. The Bank now owns a decorative corner of the palace.

options.label: Refuse politely
options.result_text: Ministan keeps its dignity and its empty pockets. Citizens applaud the principle.

proposal: Morale is cratered. Luna proposes National Smile Day: mandatory picnics, free balloons, and one government-approved grin.

options.label: Smile Day, go
options.result_text: Balloons everywhere. The Treasury funds joy at an alarming rate.

options.label: No stunts
options.result_text: No picnics. Citizens continue their dignified misery in silence.

proposal: History approaches. General Boom suggests a colossal statue of you on horseback, even though you have never ridden a horse.

options.label: Build the statue
options.result_text: The statue rises. Tourists wonder why the horse looks nervous.

options.label: A modest plaque
options.result_text: A tasteful plaque appears. Generals mutter that bronze was invented for a reason.

proposal: Ministan could dig a Grand Canal linking every village. Completion is scheduled for roughly never, but the groundbreaking photos would be magnificent.

options.label: Break ground
options.result_text: Ceremonial shovels turn one inch of soil. A sign promises completion by the year 3000.

options.label: Maybe later
options.result_text: The canal enters permanent planning. Engineers draw maps of maps.

proposal: Neighboring Tinyland is marching eight tanks through their capital. We must respond with nine tanks, or history will judge us harshly.

options.label: Nine tanks!
options.result_text: Nine tanks rumble proudly. One is borrowed and must be returned by Tuesday.

options.label: Ignore Tinyland
options.result_text: No parade. General Boom writes a strongly worded memo to history.

proposal: Order is collapsing. General Boom offers a temporary pause on spontaneous parades.

options.label: Pause the parades
options.result_text: Streets become calmer. Tank crews sulk professionally.

options.label: Keep marching
options.result_text: Discipline remains loud. Chaos remains present.

proposal: Elite loyalty is cratering. Sir Profit suggests a lavish palace dinner with suspiciously aligned seating.

options.label: Host the dinner
options.result_text: Ministers toast your wisdom. The wine is suspiciously expensive.

options.label: Skip the dinner
options.result_text: Elites dine elsewhere. Rumors gain appetizers.

proposal: Your term nears its end. Clerk Zero has prepared seventeen succession forms and one stapler.

options.label: Announce a dynasty
options.result_text: Succession forms multiply. Democracy files an objection.

options.label: Promise an election
options.result_text: Citizens cheer. Ministers update their résumés.

proposal: The final treasury audit arrives. Minister Penny smiles the way accountants smile before bad news.

options.label: Publish the audit
options.result_text: Transparency shocks everyone. Several numbers apologize.

options.label: Seal the audit
options.result_text: The audit enters a locked drawer. Rumors grow interest.
